title: stachys aspera subsp. japonica
intro: Stachys aspera subsp. japonica, also known as Japanese hedge nettle, is a subspecies of perennial herb in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stachys aspera subsp. japonica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote digestive health and relieve menstrual cramps.
